ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1: male, 0: female) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the medical record was created */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who created the record */,
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nurse who assisted */,
  "cp" INTEGER /* Chest pain type (1-4) */,
  "trtbps" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure (mmHg) */,
  "chol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level (mg/dl) */,
  "fbs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar (mg/dl) */,
  "restecg" INTEGER /* Resting ECG results */,
  "thalachh" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exng" INTEGER /* Exercise-induced angina (0/1) */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* Old peak exercise-induced ST segment depression */,
  "slp" INTEGER /* Slope of peak exercise ST segment */,
  "caa" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thall" INTEGER /* Thalassemia (1-3) */,
  "output" INTEGER /* Diagnosis (0/1/2) */,
  "hospitalization_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient was hospitalized */,
  "hospitalization_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of hospitalization */,
  "hospitalization_end_date" TEXT /* End date of hospitalization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_nurse_id FOREIGN KEY ("nurse_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made by the doctor */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the treatment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up appointments are required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)
